text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the start of Gold City's senior year, she won
tickets to a hot spring vacation in a raffle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back then, she didn't feel mentally ready for a
trip and refused to go. But now, her feelings
might have changed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think she should use this moment to finally get
some rest, so I call her in to try and persuade her.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sure. Hot spring sounds nice.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll check with my manager to see when I'm off.
You should submit your schedule, too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You didn't mean for me to go by myself, did
you?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I doubt my manager would allow that, and to be
honest, I don't know if I'd even want to go if it
was a solo thing.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to the hot springs, you have to come
with me. What do you say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... That was amazing. All the stress melted right away.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear? They said these are sodium
bicarbonate springs. They're supposed to have
cleansing effects on the skin and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Look. Isn't my skin so shiny right now?
choice_data_list: I don't know, it's always shiny...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You sound so stupid right now... but yeah, I guess
that's true.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I had this thought before, but... you're pretty into
my looks, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, I know. I'm not implying that's all you
care about.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
We've never really had a chance to, like, just talk
about silly stuff like this before, have we?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Want to... get some fresh air?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You're probably wondering why I suddenly
agreed to come here.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, I wanted to find out how you really felt
about me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I've embarrassed myself in front of you way too
many times, and it would kill me if you've gotten
the wrong impression.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
'Cause like... sure, I'm not necessarily chill. I can
be harsh, and I've got a bit of a foul mouth
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But that's because you've gotten too close. Look
at me from, like, an acquaintance's point of view
and I'm pretty cool... at least, I hope I am.
choice_data_list: My impression of you has never changed.
My impression of you has never changed.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list:
You're beautiful, strong, proud... the best
Umamusume ever.

You're beautiful, strong, proud... the best
Umamusume ever.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Haha, what is that? Are you hitting on me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Normally, I'd find that tone-deaf, but coming
from you, it's different somehow.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's funny. You're not my manager, and you're not
like a coworker. What are you to me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Uh, that's just a title, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But... maybe you're right. Just my trainer... I kinda
like the sound of it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Someone who watches me run. Someone who sees
only the real me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Not some overzealous fan who's only seen me
from afar and doesn't know the meaning of
personal space.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You don't interfere, judge, show pity, insult me,
none of that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If I hadn't run with you, I don't think I would've
ever come to like myself.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, here I am talking my mouth off. I went on
auto-pilot. Was I annoying?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So wishy-washy. Heh.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But I guess it's okay. You're just my trainer, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Gold City and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
